steps.title: Support volcano type diversity
steps.content: The student's claim is that Ecuador has several different types of volcanoes. Evidence supporting that claim must use the volcano-type information from the table and show multiple distinct categories, rather than focusing on eruption years or repeating the same type.

steps.title: Use four distinct types
steps.content: Listing Wolf as shield, Tungurahua as stratovolcano, Imbabura as compound, and Chacana as caldera gives four different volcano types and directly supports the claim. B and D misstate the types, while C discusses different eruption years instead of volcano categories. The answer is A.
